summary.key_theme: 公司透過 4.22 億美元收購 PayneCrest Electric 積極擴張數據中心與再生能源業務，雖帶動市場樂觀情緒，但 2026 年營收展望持平的預期仍對股價造成壓力。

bullish.title: Primoris Services Corp Acquires PayneCrest Electric For $422M To Expand Data Center, Industrial, And Renewables Services
bullish.reason: 以 4.22 億美元收購 PayneCrest Electric，預計 2026 年貢獻 2.6 億至 2.8 億美元營收，顯著強化公司在數據中心與工業領域的競爭力。

bullish.title: A Look At Primoris Services (PRIM) Valuation After Winning The Cormorant Energy Storage Contract
bullish.reason: 獲得 Cormorant 儲能合約，顯示公司在再生能源基礎建設市場的強勁執行力，有助於提升長期估值。

bearish.title: Primoris Services Conference: Renewables Bookings Strong, But 2026 Revenue Seen Flat to Slightly Down
bearish.reason: 儘管再生能源訂單強勁，但管理層對 2026 年營收預期持平或微幅下滑，引發市場對成長動能放緩的擔憂。

bearish.title: Primoris, Rocket Lab, Curtiss-Wright, American Superconductor, and BWX Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 反映短期市場賣壓與板塊輪動，導致股價出現修正，屬於技術性調整。

neutral.title: Advanced Energy, Matson, MasTec, FuelCell Energy, and Primoris Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 此報導為市場行情總結，股價上漲主要受產業整體情緒帶動，而非公司單一基本面事件。

neutral.title: Reflecting On Construction and Maintenance Services Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Primoris (NYSE:PRIM)
neutral.reason: 針對 Q4 財報的回顧性分析，資訊已反映在過往股價中，對當前股價影響有限。
